per_rule.rule_description: Minimum width of NW is 160nm
Minimum area of NW is 0.140 um2
Minimum enclosed area of NW is 0.140 um2
NW Must be orthogonal
Minimum vertical width of ACT layer is 48nm
Minimum Incremental vertical width of ACT layer is 40nm
per_rule.rule_script:
ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES = ACT ANGLE == 0 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES < 0.048 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.048 < 0.088 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.088 < 0.128 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.128 < 0.168 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.168 < 0.208 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.208 < 0.248 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.248 < 0.288 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.288 < 0.328 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.328 < 0.368 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.368 < 0.408 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.408 < 0.448 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.448 < 0.488 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.488 < 0.528 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.528 < 0.568 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.568 < 0.608 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.608 < 0.648 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.648 < 0.688 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.688 < 0.728 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.728 < 0.768 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.768 < 0.808 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.808 < 0.848 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.848 < 0.888 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.888 < 0.928 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.928 < 0.968 
INTERNAL ACT_HORIZONTAL_EDGES > 0.968 < 1.008

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal width of ACT is 96nm
Minimum area of ACT is 0.004608 um2
Minimum enclosed area of ACT is 0.004608 um2
Maximum distance between ACT forming a MOS device and ACT forming a bulk/substrate contact within the same well/substrate is 30um, to prevent latch up
per_rule.rule_script:
ACT_MOS_DEV_A = GATEA AND ACT 
ACT_MOS_DEV_B = GATEB AND ACT 
 
ACT_CONTACT = AIL1 AND ACT 
NTAP = NW AND NIM 
AIL1_NTAP = ACT_CONTACT AND NTAP 
AIL1_PTAP = ACT_CONTACT AND PIM 
a = AIL1_NTAP SIZE BY 30 
ACT_MOS_DEV_A NOT INSIDE a 
ACT_MOS_DEV_B NOT INSIDE a 
b = AIL1_PTAP SIZE BY 30 
ACT_MOS_DEV_A NOT INSIDE b 
ACT_MOS_DEV_B NOT INSIDE b

per_rule.rule_description: Exact horizontal width of GATE [A] is 20, 16 or 14 nm
per_rule.rule_script:
INTERNAL GATEA_vertical_edges < 0.014 
INTERNAL GATEA_vertical_edges > 0.014 < 0.016 
INTERNAL GATEA_vertical_edges > 0.016 < 0.020 
INTERNAL GATEA_vertical_edges > 0.020 < 0.200

per_rule.rule_description: Exact horizontal width of GATE [B] is 20, 16 or 14 nm
per_rule.rule_script:
INTERNAL GATEB_vertical_edges < 0.014 
INTERNAL GATEB_vertical_edges > 0.014 < 0.016 
INTERNAL GATEB_vertical_edges > 0.016 < 0.020 
INTERNAL GATEB_vertical_edges > 0.020 < 0.200

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum length of Gate A (vertical edge, gate C ignored) 200nm
Minimum length of Gate B (vertical edge, gate C ignored) 200nm
(gatea not gatec) maximum distance to neighbor shape on same design mask is 236nm
per_rule.rule_script:
GateAnotC = GATEA NOT GATEC 
x = SIZE GateAnotC BY 0.237 
GATEA NOT x

per_rule.rule_description: (gateb not gatec) maximum distance to neighbor shape 236nm
per_rule.rule_script:
GateBnotC = GATEB NOT GATEC 
x = SIZE GateBnotC BY 0.237 
GATEB NOT x

per_rule.rule_description: Exact horizontal width of GATE [AB] is 20, 16 or 14 nm
per_rule.rule_script:
INTERNAL GATEAB_VERTICAL_EDGES < 0.014 
INTERNAL GATEAB_VERTICAL_EDGES > 0.014 < 0.016 
INTERNAL GATEAB_VERTICAL_EDGES > 0.016 < 0.020 
INTERNAL GATEAB_VERTICAL_EDGES > 0.020 < 0.800

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum length of Gate AB (vertical edge, gate C ignored) 200nm
(gateAB not gatec) maximum distance to neighbor shape 236nm
per_rule.rule_script:
GateABnotC = GATEAB NOT GATEC 
x = SIZE GateABnotC BY 0.237 
GATEAB NOT x

per_rule.rule_description: Exact vertical width of GATEC is 32nm (1 is arbitrary large value) shape is oriented horizonally
per_rule.rule_script:
vert_edges = GATEC ANGLE == 90 
hor_edges = GATEC ANGLE == 0 
vert_edges_int = INT vert_edges < 1 
hor_edges_int = INT hor_edges < 1 
vert_polygons = DFM PROPERTY GATEC hor_edges_int vert_edges_int OVERLAP MULTI [check1 = EW(vert_edges_int) - EW(hor_edges_int)] < 0 
hor_polygons = DFM PROPERTY GATEC hor_edges_int vert_edges_int OVERLAP MULTI [check2 = EW(vert_edges_int) - EW(hor_edges_int)] > 0 
hor_edges_hor_pol = hor_polygons angle == 0 
INT hor_edges_hor_pol > 0 < 0.032 
INT hor_edges_hor_pol > 0.032 < 1

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal length of GATEC is 128nm shape is oriented horizonatally
per_rule.rule_script:
vert_edges = GATEC ANGLE == 90 
hor_edges = GATEC ANGLE == 0 
vert_edges_int = INT vert_edges < 1 
hor_edges_int = INT hor_edges < 1 
vert_polygons = DFM PROPERTY GATEC hor_edges_int vert_edges_int OVERLAP MULTI [check1 = EW(vert_edges_int) - EW(hor_edges_int)] < 0 
hor_polygons = DFM PROPERTY GATEC hor_edges_int vert_edges_int OVERLAP MULTI [check2 = EW(vert_edges_int) - EW(hor_edges_int)] > 0 
vert_edges_hor_pol = hor_polygons angle == 90 
INT vert_edges_hor_pol < 0.128

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum space of GATEC is 128nm
GATEC shape bottom or top must be aligned if distance < 192nm
per_rule.rule_script:
ext_region = EXT GATEC < 0.192 REGION 
angled_edges = ANGLE ext_region >0 <90 
angled_regions = ext_region WITH EDGE angled_edges 
GATEC INTERACT angled_regions

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum width of NIM is 128nm
Minimum width of PIM is 128nm
Minimum area of NIM is 0.049 um2
Minimum enclosed area of NIM is 0.049 um2
Minimum area of PIM is 0.049 um2
Minimum enclosed area of PIM is 0.049 um2
Horizontal Width of AIL1 is 28nm
Minimum Vertical length of AIL1 is 58nm
Horizontal width of AIL2 is 24nm
Vertical length of AIL2 is 68nm
Minimum vertical width of GIL is 44nm
Minimum horizontal length of GIL is 56nm
V0 is a square with 28nm edge length
M1A width 28nm, 32nm, 40nm, 2.4um (10um is arbitrary)
M1B width 28nm, 32nm, 40nm, 2.4um (10um is arbitrary)
M1 minimum width 28nm
One of two edges connected to the same vertex must have at least one of 56nm
per_rule.rule_script:
x = CONVEX EDGE M1A ANGLE1==90 ANGLE2==90 WITH LENGTH < 0.056 
INT x < 0.001 ABUT

per_rule.rule_description: One of two edges connected to the same vertex must have at least one of 56nm
per_rule.rule_script:
x = CONVEX EDGE M1B ANGLE1==90 ANGLE2==90 WITH LENGTH < 0.056 
INT x < 0.001 ABUT

per_rule.rule_description: One of two edges connected to the same vertex must have at least one of 56nm
per_rule.rule_script:
x = CONVEX EDGE M1 ANGLE1==90 ANGLE2==90 WITH LENGTH < 0.056 
INT x < 0.001 ABUT

per_rule.rule_description: maximum length of M1A for wires with min width 28nm is 1.8um
per_rule.rule_script:
wide_M1A = M1A with width <= 0.028 
d = INT wide_M1A <= 1 opposite 
d_p = dfm property wide_M1A d overlap abut also [EC1 = EC(d)] > 1.80 
copy d_p

per_rule.rule_description: maximum length of M1B for wires with min width 28nm is 1.8um
per_rule.rule_script:
wide_M1B = M1B with width <= 0.028

per_rule.rule_script:

per_rule.rule_description: MINT4A minimum area for rectangular shape is 0.0024um2
Minimum horizontal width of WELL is 108 nm.
Minimum vertical width of WELL is 54 nm.
Minimum area of WELL is 5832 nm-sq.
Minimum enclosed area of WELL is 5832 nm-sq.
Exact vertical FIN width is 7 nm.
Minimum horizontal FIN width is 108 nm.
GATE.W.1 Exact horizontal GATE width is 20 nm.
Minimum vertical GATE width is 40 nm.
Minimum vertical width of ACTIVE layer is 27 nm.
ACTIVE layer vertical width increment is an integer multiple of 27 nm.
per_rule.rule_script:
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE < 0.027 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.027 < 0.054 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.054 < 0.081 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.081 < 0.108 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.108 < 0.135 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.135 < 0.162 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.162 < 0.189 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.189 < 0.216 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.216 < 0.243 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.243 < 0.270 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.270 < 0.297 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.297 < 0.324 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.324 < 0.351 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.351 < 0.378 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.378 < 0.405 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.405 < 0.432 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.432 < 0.459 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.459 < 0.486 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.486 < 0.513 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.513 < 0.540 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.540 < 0.567 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.567 < 0.594 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.594 < 0.621 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.621 < 0.648 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.648 < 0.675 OPPOSITE

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal width of ACTIVE is 16 nm.
Minimum vertical width of GCUT is 17 nm.
GCUT.AUX.3 GCUT may not interact with channel.
Minimum horizontal width of NSELECT is 108 nm.
Minimum vertical width of NSELECT is 54 nm.
Minimum horizontal width of PSELECT is 108 nm.
Minimum vertical width of PSELECT is 54 nm.
Minimum horizontal width of SLVT is 108 nm.
Minimum vertical width of SLVT is 54 nm.
Minimum horizontal width of LVT is 108 nm.
Minimum vertical width of LVT is 54 nm.
Minimum horizontal width of SRAMVT is 108 nm.
Minimum vertical width of SRAMVT is 54 nm.
Width of dummy should be 40 nm
SDT.W.1 Minimum horizontal width of SDT is 24 nm.
LISD.W.1 Minimum width of LISD is 24 nm.
LISD.A.1 Minimum LISD area is 648 nm-sq.
LIG.W.1 Minimum width of LIG is 16 nm.
LIG.A.1 Minimum LIG area is 324 nm-sq.
Minimum width of M1 is 18 nm.
Minimum M1 area is 504 nm-sq.
Minimum width of M2 is 18 nm.
Minimum M2 area is 504 nm-sq.
Minimum width of M3 is 18 nm.
Minimum M3 area is 504 nm-sq.
Minimum vertical width of M4 is 24 nm.
Maximum vertical width of M4 is 480 nm.
per_rule.rule_script: INTERNAL M4_HE > 20*VAR_M4_1X < 10000*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

per_rule.rule_description: M4 vertical width may not be an even integer multiple of its minimum width.
per_rule.rule_script:
INTERNAL M4_HE ==  2*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE ==  4*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE ==  6*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE ==  8*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 10*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 12*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 14*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 16*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 18*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 20*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

per_rule.rule_description: M4 vertical width, resulting in the polygon spanning an even number of minimum width routing tracks vertically, is not allowed.
per_rule.rule_script:
INTERNAL M4_HE ==  3*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE ==  7*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 11*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 15*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 19*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal width of M4 is 44 nm.
M4 horizontal edges must be at a grid of 24 nm.
per_rule.rule_script: OFFGRID M4 1 VAR_M4_1X_DBU OFFSET 0 VAR_M4_YOFFSET HINT

INTERNAL M6_HE ==  4*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE ==  6*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE ==  8*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 10*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 12*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 14*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 16*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 18*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 20*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

per_rule.rule_description: M6 vertical width, resulting in the polygon spanning an even number of minimum width routing tracks vertically, is not allowed.
per_rule.rule_script:
INTERNAL M6_HE ==  3*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE ==  7*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 11*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 15*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 19*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal width of M6 is 44 nm.
M6 horizontal edges must be at a grid of 32 nm.
per_rule.rule_script: OFFGRID M6 1 VAR_M6_1X_DBU OFFSET 0 VAR_M6_YOFFSET HINT

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum horizontal width of M7 is 32 nm.
Maximum horizontal width of M7 is 640 nm.
per_rule.rule_script: INTERNAL M7_VE > 20*VAR_M7_1X < 10000*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

per_rule.rule_description: M7 horizontal width may not be an even integer multiple of its minimum width.
per_rule.rule_script:
INTERNAL M7_VE ==  2*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE ==  4*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE ==  6*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE ==  8*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE == 10*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE == 12*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE == 14*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE == 16*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE == 18*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE == 20*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

per_rule.rule_description: M7 horizontal width, resulting in the polygon spanning an even number of minimum width routing tracks horizontally, is not allowed.
per_rule.rule_script:
INTERNAL M7_VE ==  3*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE ==  7*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE == 11*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE == 15*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE == 19*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum vertical width of M7 is 44 nm.
M7 vertical edges must be at a grid of 32 nm.
per_rule.rule_script: OFFGRID M7 VAR_M7_1X_DBU 1 OFFSET VAR_M7_XOFFSET 0 HINT

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum width of M8 is 40 nm.
Minimum width of M8, when its length >= 400 nm and < 1200 nm, is 60 nm.
per_rule.rule_script:
X = LENGTH M8 > 0.4 < 1.2 
Y = M8 WITH EDGE X 
INTERNAL Y < 0.060

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum width of M8, when its length >= 1200 nm and < 1800 nm, is 80 nm.
per_rule.rule_script:
X = LENGTH M8 >=1.2 < 1.8 
Y = M8 WITH EDGE X 
INTERNAL Y < 0.080

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum width of M8, when its length >= 1800 nm, is 120 nm.
per_rule.rule_script:
X = LENGTH M8 >=1.8 
Y = M8 WITH EDGE X 
INTERNAL Y < 0.12

per_rule.rule_description: Maximum width of M8 is 2000 nm.
Minimum area of M8 is 7520 nm-sq.
Minimum feature length of M8 is 40 nm.
per_rule.rule_script: CONVEX EDGE M8 ANGLE1 == 90 ANGLE2 > 90 WITH LENGTH < 0.040

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum width of M9 is 40 nm.
Minimum width of M9, when its length >= 400 nm and < 1200 nm, is 60 nm.
per_rule.rule_script:
X = LENGTH M9 > 0.4 < 1.2 
Y = M9 WITH EDGE X 
INTERNAL Y < 0.060

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum width of M9, when its length >= 1200 nm and < 1800 nm, is 80 nm.
per_rule.rule_script:
X = LENGTH M9 >=1.2 < 1.8 
Y = M9 WITH EDGE X 
INTERNAL Y < 0.080

per_rule.rule_description: Minimum width of M9, when its length >= 1800 nm, is 120 nm.
per_rule.rule_script:
X = LENGTH M9 >=1.8 
Y = M9 WITH EDGE X 
INTERNAL Y < 0.12

per_rule.rule_description: Maximum width of M9 is 2000 nm.
Minimum area of M9 is 7520 nm-sq.
Minimum feature length of M9 is 40 nm.
per_rule.rule_script: CONVEX EDGE M9 ANGLE1 == 90 ANGLE2 > 90 WITH LENGTH < 0.040

per_rule.rule_description: Exact width of a V8 instance is [40 nm x 40 nm | 40 nm x 120 nm | 120 nm x 40 nm].
per_rule.rule_script:
x= NOT RECTANGLE V8 == 0.04 BY ==0.04 
y= NOT RECTANGLE V8 == 0.12 BY ==0.04 
z= NOT RECTANGLE V8 == 0.04 BY ==0.12 
x AND (y AND z)

per_rule.rule_description: Exact width of a V9 instance is [40 nm x 40 nm | 40 nm x 120 nm | 120 nm x 40 nm].
per_rule.rule_script:
x= NOT RECTANGLE V9 == 0.04 BY ==0.04 
y= NOT RECTANGLE V9 == 0.12 BY ==0.04 
z= NOT RECTANGLE V9 == 0.04 BY ==0.12 
x AND (y AND z)
